organization.title: Organization
organization.name: Name
organization.invitePeopleDescription: Invite people to join your Label Studio instance. People that you invite have full access to all of your projects.
organization.legacyTokensDesc: Enable legacy access tokens, these do not expire
organization.tokenTTLDesc: The number of days, after creation, that the token will be valid for. After this time period a user will need to create a new access token

settings.title: Settings
settings.simplifyProjectManagement: Simplify project management by organizing projects into workspaces.
settings.sequentialDescription: Tasks are ordered by Task ID
settings.randomDescription: Tasks are chosen with uniform random
settings.uncertaintySamplingDescription: Tasks are chosen according to model uncertainty score (active learning mode).
settings.labelingInstructionsDescription: Write instructions to help users complete labeling tasks.
settings.labelingInstructionsHtml: The instruction field supports HTML markup and it allows use of images, iframes (pdf).
settings.dangerZoneDescription: Perform these actions at your own risk. Actions you take on this page can't be reverted. Make sure your data is backed up.
settings.deleteAllThings: You're about to delete all things. This action cannot be undone.
settings.resetCacheHelp: Reset Cache may help in cases like if you are unable to modify the labeling configuration due to validation errors concerning existing labels, but you are confident that the labels don't exist. You can use this action to reset the cache and try again.
settings.dropAllTabsHelp: If the Data Manager is not loading, dropping all Data Manager tabs can help.
settings.deleteProjectHelp: Deleting a project removes all tasks, annotations, and project data from the database.
settings.typeToProceed: To proceed, type "{{word}}" in the field below:
settings.resetCacheMessage: You are about to reset the cache for {{title}}. This action cannot be undone.
settings.dropTabsMessage: You are about to drop all tabs for {{title}}. This action cannot be undone.
settings.deleteProjectMessage: You are about to delete the project {{title}}. This action cannot be undone.
settings.usePredictionsToPrelabelDescription: Enable and select which set of predictions to use for prelabeling.

predictions.title: Predictions
predictions.predictionsListDescription: List of predictions available in the project. Each card is associated with a separate model version. To learn about how to import predictions,
predictions.noPredictionsDescription: Upload predictions to automatically prelabel your data and speed up annotation. Import predictions from multiple model versions to compare their performance, or connect live models from the Model page to generate predictions on demand.
predictions.deletePredictionsConfirm: This action cannot be undone. Are you sure?
predictions.modelVersionUndefined: Model version is undefined. Likely means that model_version field was missing when predictions were imported.
predictions.selectModelOrPredictions: Select which predictions or which model you want to use:

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.webhookDescription: Setup integrations that subscribe to certain events using Webhooks. When an event is triggered, Label Studio sends an HTTP POST request to the configured webhook URL.
webhooks.contactAdminForWebhooks: Contact your administrator to create Webhooks
webhooks.webhookSetupDescription: Setup integrations that subscribe to certain events using Webhooks. When an event is triggered, {appName} sends an HTTP POST request to the configured webhook URL.
webhooks.learnMoreAria: Learn more about webhooks (opens in new window)
webhooks.deleteConfirmBody: Are you sure you want to delete the webhook? This action cannot be undone.

storage.syncingMayTakeTime: Syncing may take some time, please refresh the page to see the current status.
storage.cloudStorageDescription: Use cloud or database storage as the source for your labeling tasks or the target of your completed annotations.
storage.troubleshootingTips: for troubleshooting tips on cloud storage connections.
storage.deleteStorageConfirm: This action cannot be undone. Are you sure?

machineLearning.deleteMlBackendConfirm: This action cannot be undone. Are you sure?
machineLearning.learnMoreAria: Learn more about machine learning models (opens in new window)
machineLearning.connectedModelDetected: A connected model has been detected! If you wish to fetch predictions from this model, please follow these steps:
machineLearning.clickBatchPredictions: 3. Click on Batch predictions from the Actions menu.
machineLearning.useModelPredictionsForPrelabeling: If you want to use the model predictions for prelabeling, please configure this in the <link>Annotation settings</link>.
machineLearning.connectModelDescription: Connect a machine learning model to generate live predictions for your project. Compare predictions, accelerate labeling with automatic prelabeling, and direct your team to the most impactful tasks through active learning.
machineLearning.startTrainingOnAnnotation: Start model training on annotation submission
machineLearning.startTrainingOnAnnotationDescription: This option will send a request to /train with information about annotations. You can use this to enable an Active Learning loop. You can also manually start training through model menu in its card.
machineLearning.name: Name
machineLearning.extraParams: Any extra params to pass during model connection
machineLearning.interactivePreannotationsDescription: If enabled some labeling tools will send requests to the ML Backend interactively during the annotation process.
machineLearning.failedToAddMlBackend: Failed to add new ML backend.

models.createModelDescription: Build a high quality model to auto-label your data using LLMs

labelingConfig.showControlsToZoomInAndOut: Show controls to zoom in and out

validationMessages.annotationsIncompatibleIntro: Created annotations are incompatible with provided labeling schema, we found:

export.filesBeingPrepared: Files are being prepared. It might take some time.
export.exportDatasetFormats: You can export dataset in one of the following formats:
export.orSubmitIssue: or submit an issue to the

json.title: JSON
json.description: List of items in raw JSON format stored in one JSON file. Use to export both the data and the annotations for a dataset. It's Label Studio Common Format

json_min.title: JSON-MIN
json_min.description: List of items where only "from_name", "to_name" values from the raw JSON format are exported. Use to export only the annotations for a dataset.

csv.title: CSV
csv.description: Results are stored as comma-separated values with the column names specified by the values of the "from_name" and "to_name" fields.

tsv.title: TSV
tsv.description: Results are stored in tab-separated tabular file with column names specified by "from_name" "to_name" values

coco.title: COCO
coco.description: Popular machine learning format used by the COCO dataset for object detection and image segmentation tasks with polygons and rectangles.

yolo.title: YOLO
yolo.description: Popular TXT format is created for each image file. Each txt file contains annotations for the corresponding image file, that is object class, object coordinates, height & width.

yolo_obb.title: YOLOv8 OBB
yolo_obb.description: Popular TXT format is created for each image file. Each txt file contains annotations for the corresponding image file. The YOLO OBB format designates bounding boxes by their four corner points with coordinates normalized between 0 and 1, so it is possible to export rotated objects.

yolo_obb_with_images.title: YOLOv8 OBB with Images
yolo_obb_with_images.description: YOLOv8 OBB format with images downloaded.

conll2003.title: CONLL2003
conll2003.description: Popular format used for the CoNLL-2003 named entity recognition challenge.

voc.title: Pascal VOC XML
voc.description: Popular XML format used for object detection and polygon image segmentation tasks.

brush_to_numpy.title: Brush labels to NumPy
brush_to_numpy.description: Export your brush labels as NumPy 2d arrays. Each label outputs as one image.

brush_to_png.title: Brush labels to PNG
brush_to_png.description: Export your brush labels as PNG images. Each label outputs as one image.

brush_to_coco.title: Brush labels to COCO
brush_to_coco.description: Export your brush labels as COCO format for segmentation tasks. Converts RLE encoded masks to COCO polygons.

asr_manifest.title: ASR Manifest
asr_manifest.description: Export audio transcription labels for automatic speech recognition as the JSON manifest format expected by NVIDIA NeMo models.

accountSettings.hotkeysDescription: Customize your keyboard shortcuts to speed up your workflow. Click on any hotkey below to assign a new key combination that works best for you.

personalAccessTokenDesc.description: Authenticate with our API using your personal access token.
personalAccessTokenDesc.oneActiveTokenTooltip: You can only have one active token
personalAccessTokenDesc.copyTokenHint: Copy your new access token from below and keep it secure.
personalAccessTokenDesc.doNotShareKey: Do not share this key with anyone. If you suspect any keys have been compromised, you should revoke them and create new ones.
personalAccessTokenDesc.revokeTokenConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this access token? Any application using this token will need a new token to be able to access {{appName}}

hotkeys.duplicateHotkeyDescription: The hotkey combination "{{key}}" is already being used by:
hotkeys.duplicateHotkeyWarning: Having duplicate hotkeys may cause conflicts and unexpected behavior. Are you sure you want to proceed?
hotkeys.resetHotkeysBody: Are you sure you want to reset all hotkeys and settings to their default values? This action cannot be undone.
hotkeys.resetSuccess: All hotkeys and settings have been reset to defaults and saved
hotkeys.couldNotLoadHotkeys: Could not load custom hotkeys from server, using cached settings
hotkeys.importHotkeysDescription: Paste your exported hotkeys JSON below. This will replace your current hotkeys. Make sure the JSON contains an array of hotkey objects with the required fields.
hotkeys.pleaseEnterJsonData: Please enter JSON data to import
hotkeys.invalidFormatHotkeysArray: Invalid format: hotkeys property must be an array
hotkeys.invalidFormatExpected: Invalid format: expected an array of hotkeys or an object with a hotkeys property
hotkeys.noHotkeysFound: No hotkeys found in the imported data
